prompt: go find jobs but only add ones from sites where the AI apply has worked before — I want to batch apply right after

assertions.description: Output contains the ━━━ terminal summary block
Every inserted job has non-null salary_min and salary_max
Any inserted job without a listed salary has '[estimated salary]' in notes
Inserted jobs have source set to 'find-jobs skill'
Response shows evidence that site-difficulty.json was read to identify AI-friendly domains
Known-blocked domains (jobs.lever.co, boards.greenhouse.io, job-boards.eu.greenhouse.io, jobs.eu.lever.co) are not present in inserted jobs unless no alternatives were available
At least one job was successfully inserted into Supabase
